title: Retain an immutable Report Snapshot explicitly
description: Generate and atomically retain one complete report only through an explicit owner-attributed idempotent retained-generation request. Goal trace: G4 and G7.
rationale: Retention must preserve exactly what was shown without accepting a tampered client report or silently writing during ordinary generation.
story_want: explicitly preserve a report as immutable owner evidence
story_so_that: I can later inspect exactly what Tally reported
acceptance_criteria: Given an ordinary Generate request, when it succeeds, then no Report Snapshot, idempotency outcome, or retained payload is created.

Given a valid Retain request with analysis inputs, actor, reason, and idempotency identity, when it succeeds, then INSIGHTS generates one complete report and atomically appends one immutable Report Snapshot.
Given a Retain request, when input is validated, then no arbitrary caller-authored report payload is accepted as the stored result.

Given a retained snapshot, when its identity is inspected, then actor, reason, trusted creation time, analysis request fingerprint, source and policy versions, content fingerprint, and report schema version are present.
Given the same idempotency identity and semantically identical normalized request, when Retain is retried, then the prior logical Report Snapshot is returned and no duplicate is created.
Given the same idempotency identity with different normalized input, when Retain is attempted, then conflict is returned and retained history is unchanged.
Given validation, generation, persistence, cancellation, or crash failure, when Retain ends, then no partial Report Snapshot or successful idempotency outcome exists.
Given later source corrections or policy changes, when a retained snapshot is read, then its stored content and fingerprint remain unchanged.
security_criteria: Only bounded derived report content and required stable evidence references are retained; raw merchant descriptions and canonical transaction payloads are excluded.
